holdings.infoBox: SOCL is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are NAVER stock at 10.38%, Reddit at 10.07%, Tencent Holdings at 9.18%, Meta Platforms at 8.95%, and Kuaishou Technology at 7.79%.

overview.description: The Global X Social Media ETF (SOCL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a modified market-cap-weighted index of social media companies selected by a committee. SOCL was launched on Nov 14, 2011 and is issued by Global X.

data.title: Social media stocks plunge on Snapchat warning
data.text: Wall Street was not in a particularly social mood Tuesday. Social media stocks plummeted following an ominous earnings warning from Snapchat's parent company.
